markdown:
#  Create a Specification Set 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * You can only create a new specification set when you upload new specifications.
  * You can only upload specifications that are saved as (.pdf) files.


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Specifications** tool.
  2. Click **Upload**.
  3. Select a file to upload. See [Upload Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/upload-specifications). 
#####  Tip
It is recommended that you upload your spec book as _**one PDF**_ instead of uploading each section as a separate file.
  4. Click the **Specifcation Set** drop-down menu.
  5. Enter the name of the new set into the Search bar.
  6. Click **Create Set**.
  7. Enter the information for the set. See [Upload Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/upload-specifications) for a list of fields.
  8. Click **Process**.


## See Also
  * [Specifications - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/permissions)
  * [What is a specification set?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-a-specification-set)
  * [Configure Advanced Settings: Specifications](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/specifications-project/tutorials/configure-advanced-settings-specifications)
title: Create a Specification Set
description: How to create a new specification set to house the newest revisions of specifications.
